item.title: Debugger: add panes of borrow stacks and instances search
item.body:
- Enhanced debugger navigation with a new `Instances` pane and run-to-instance flow.
  `Shortcuts:` `/` start editing the instance search, `?` reopen search and clear the current query, `Enter` run to the selected instance, `.` / `,` jump to the next / previous match, `[` / `]` browse search history while editing, `Esc` exit or clear the search, `Up` / `Down` move selection, `PageUp` / `PageDown` page through results.

- Added a new step mode for frame terminators and tightened execution controls.
  `Shortcuts:` `n` step over, `space` step to the next frame terminator, `b` step back, `c` continue, `e` run to end, `t` run to a terminator, and numeric prefixes apply to `n` and `t`.

- Expanded the borrow-stacks inspector into a modal view with richer allocation and retag metadata.
  `Shortcuts:` `s` open or close the borrow-stacks modal, `Up` / `Down` move between rows, `PageUp` / `PageDown` scroll by page, mouse clicks select rows, and clicking outside the modal closes it.
  The table now shows additional fields such as `PrevTagID`, `RetagInfo`, `Exposed`, and more allocation context.

- Precomputed reachable function instances for debugger targeting and source navigation.
  This supports the new instance search and `RunToInstance` behavior.

- Redirected debugger diagnostics to `miri_diagnostics.txt` when `--debugger` is enabled.
  This keeps interpreter diagnostics out of the TUI terminal.


https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7c29d362-0c75-4bf3-9305-eb58e3dfcf59

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/975baf60-52ad-481e-a956-1d77cd92384b
